Source   Edit  

Types

DeglazeFormat = object
Source   Edit   
GlazeError = object of ValueError
Source   Edit   
GlazeFormat = object
Source   Edit   
RawNimNode = distinct NimNode
nimnode that stays the same during serialization Source   Edit  

Consts

glazeDumpErrorNode {.strdefine.} = ""
what way to dump a node on an error if "repr", uses repr if "tree", uses treeRepr otherwise, does not dump the node Source   Edit   
nimNodeLitCache = r"glaze.nimnodelits"
Source   Edit

Source   Edit   
proc marshal(format: GlazeFormat; node: NimNode): NimNode {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

proc read(format: DeglazeFormat; node: NimNode; val: var bool) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, GlazeError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit

    ...raises: [GlazeError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
